executives.name: Thomas Bell
executives.background: Thomas A. Bell has served as our Chief Executive Officer since May 2023. Prior to joining Leidos, Mr. Bell was President of Defense at Rolls-Royce and Chairman and CEO of Rolls-Royce North America. He also previously served as Senior Vice President of Global Strategy and Business Development at Boeing Defense, Space & Security.

executives.name: Christopher Cage
executives.background: Christopher R. Cage has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer from 2016 to 2022. He has been with the company and its predecessor since 1996.

executives.name: Gerard Fasano
executives.background: Gerard A. Fasano has served as President of the Defense Systems Sector since January 2024. He previously served as President of the Defense Group from 2018 to 2023. He joined Leidos in 2016 following the Lockheed Martin IS&GS merger.

executives.name: James Reagan
executives.background: James G. Reagan has served as our Executive Vice President and General Counsel since 2017. Prior to joining Leidos, he was Senior Vice President and General Counsel at Vencore, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel

board_of_directors.name: Robert Shapard
board_of_directors.background: Robert S. Shapard has served as the independent Chairman of the Board since 2022. He was previously the Chairman and CEO of Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Bell
board_of_directors.background: Thomas A. Bell is the Chief Executive Officer of Leidos. He joined the board upon his appointment as CEO in May 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory Dahlberg
board_of_directors.background: Gregory R. Dahlberg previously served as Senior Vice President for Strategic Planning at Lockheed Martin Corporation and as Under Secretary of the Army.

board_of_directors.name: David Fubini
board_of_directors.background: David G. Fubini is a Senior Lecturer at Harvard Business School and a Director Emeritus of McKinsey & Company.

board_of_directors.name: Miriam John
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Miriam E. John is a retired Vice President of Sandia National Laboratories and serves on various government advisory boards.

board_of_directors.name: Surya Mohapatra
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Surya N. Mohapatra was formerly the Chairman, President and CEO of Quest Diagnostics Incorporated.
